pi_items.source: setup_task.sh cleanup and verifier.py expected_new_name check
setup_task.sh directory preparation and export_result.sh check path

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated routine data injected via a Django script in setup_task.sh. The routine named 'Push-Pull-Legs' is explicitly seeded. The target downloaded directory is confirmed to be /home/ga/Downloads/. The verifier strictly checks the database for the new name 'Push-Pull-Legs (Hypertrophy Phase)' and parses the downloaded PDF using pdfminer to ensure the new name is present in the document. The scoring logic perfectly matches the metadata breakdown.
